title: crataegus mackenzii var. bracteata
intro: Crataegus mackenzii var. bracteata, also known as Mackenzie's hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant native to the mountainous regions of British Columbia, Canada. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective properties. The health benefits of Crataegus mackenzii var. bracteata include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart disease. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to support heart health and overall well-being.
